title: Tarot: Empress
description: A mashup of magic and technology with a dash of difficulty to seek out!
body:
This modpack was created as a followup to The Tarot Pact, a previous modpack in Fabric that I'd made for my stream community. 

Automation is a strength, with Mekanism, Industrial Foregoing, and Create taking frontseat, Botania, Primal Magic, and Ars Nouveau to keep your chaos entities and pyromaniacs busy.
